title: BIGUANIDE SULPHATE AS A REAGENT FOR THE ESTIMATION OF NICKEL
author: ANIL KUMAR MAJUMDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Nickel has been estimated volumetrically using biguanide sulphate which forms insoluble co-ordination compound with nickel.
steps_raw: Nickel has been estimated volumetrically using biguanide sulphate which forms insoluble co-ordination compound with nickel.
